race.comment: DUST ASIDE (4) gave away a big start and never came on when resuming last start, finishing ninth over 1100m at this track. Looks well placed so expect a better run this time. BONDI QUEEN (12) tackled a dirt track for the first time last start when second-up from a spell, finishing fourth and beaten 5.5 lengths over 1100m at this track. Can play a leading role. OLE GRANDE (3) impressed last time out at the second run of the campaign and finished 3.5 lengths from the winner in third over 1300m at this track after being prominent at the bend. Likely improver with strong prospects. ANGEL LIKE YOU (10) finished 10 lengths from the winner in sixth at her most recent outing over 1300m at this track. Well placed on this occasion and is a likely improver. LADY MAYFLOWER (6) won't be far away.
